title: Corunastylis insignis
intro: Corunastylis insignis, also known as the Yellow-bellied Sunbird Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The plant is rich in various bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which have been found to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its potential health benefits. uses: Corunastylis insignis, also known as the Western Greenhood, has been used in traditional Aboriginal medicine in Western Australia.
